_comment: RULESET: Protect main branch
HOW TO IMPORT:
GitHub → Settings → Rules → Rulesets → ▼ New ruleset → Import a ruleset
Upload this file. Then in 'Bypass list' replace the placeholder actor_id
with your real user/team ID (see SETUP NOTES below).
WHAT THIS ENFORCES:
• No direct pushes — every change must come through a Pull Request
• No force pushes — git history is permanent
• No branch deletion
• Require 1 approving review (code owner review required)
• Stale reviews dismissed when new commits are pushed
• Status check 'CI Gate · Feature → Main' must be GREEN before merge
• Linear history (squash / rebase merges only — keeps log clean)
BYPASS ACTORS (who can skip the PR approval count, but NOT the CI gate):
actor_type RepositoryRole, actor_id 5 = Admin role
bypass_mode 'pull_request' = admins can merge without an extra approver,
but they CANNOT push directly to main and CI must still pass.
SETUP NOTES:
1. The 'integration_id: 15368' is the GitHub Actions app — do not change it.
2. To restrict merges to specific users, add a Team bypass actor instead:
{ 'actor_id': <your-team-id>, 'actor_type': 'Team', 'bypass_mode': 'pull_request' }
Find team IDs at: https://api.github.com/orgs/<org>/teams
3. For a solo/personal repo the Admin role bypass is sufficient.
4. Remove 'required_linear_history' if your team prefers merge commits.
name: Protect · main
